## Variables

<a name="ErrHistoryEmpty"></a>

```go
var (
    ErrHistoryEmpty  = errors.New("wallpaper history is empty")
    ErrAlreadyOldest = errors.New("already at the oldest wallpaper in history")
    ErrAlreadyNewest = errors.New("already at the most recent wallpaper in history")
)
```

<a name="Append"></a>
## func [Append](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L97>)

```go
func Append(h *History, entry Entry)
```

Append adds a new entry at the front of the history \(newest\-first\), resets CurrentIndex to 0, and trims the list to MaxEntries.

<a name="DefaultPath"></a>
## func [DefaultPath](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L39>)

```go
func DefaultPath() (string, error)
```

DefaultPath returns the path to the history file, located in a "history" subdirectory next to the executable: \<exe\_dir\>/history/gopaper.json

<a name="Save"></a>
## func [Save](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L78>)

```go
func Save(path string, h *History) error
```

Save writes the history to path, creating parent directories as needed.

<a name="Entry"></a>
## type [Entry](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L21-L26>)

Entry represents a single wallpaper that was applied.

```go
type Entry struct {
    Path      string    `json:"path"`
    Category  string    `json:"category"`
    Mode      string    `json:"mode"`
    Timestamp time.Time `json:"timestamp"`
}
```

<a name="Next"></a>
### func [Next](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L120>)

```go
func Next(h *History) (Entry, error)
```

Next moves CurrentIndex to a newer entry and returns it.

<a name="Prev"></a>
### func [Prev](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L107>)

```go
func Prev(h *History) (Entry, error)
```

Prev moves CurrentIndex to an older entry and returns it.

<a name="History"></a>
## type [History](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L31-L35>)

History is the persistent navigation state for wallpaper history. Entries are stored newest\-first \(index 0 = most recently applied\). CurrentIndex tracks which entry is currently displayed.

```go
type History struct {
    Entries      []Entry `json:"entries"`
    CurrentIndex int     `json:"current_index"`
    MaxEntries   int     `json:"max_entries"`
}
```

<a name="Load"></a>
### func [Load](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L50>)

```go
func Load(path string, limit int) (*History, error)
```

Load reads the history file from path. limit overrides the stored MaxEntries when positive; pass 0 to keep the previously saved value \(or the package default for a file that doesn't exist yet\).
